name: Backend Maturity Implementation Board
objective: Deliver backend maturity epics with strict targeted, full-suite, and KPI test-before-commit gates across runtime, contracts, auth, observability, and release readiness.
exit_criteria: All epic subtasks completed with evidence of targeted + full backend unit/integration + KPI suite execution before commit
API v2 parity and contract normalization verified via integration tests and response-contract assertions
Auth/session, ingestion, and observability hardening validated with unit + integration coverage
Release readiness report documents risks, pass/fail matrix, and deployment go/no-go recommendation
